name: todomvc-vanilla
description: Vendored TodoMVC vanilla JS. Functional reference implementation for core CRUD/filter/persistence flows, with known legacy accessibility and static-resource issues Iris should surface.
spec: Standard TodoMVC contract: add, edit, delete, and complete todos; filter by All, Active, and Completed; clear completed items; persist todos across reload.

expected_to_NOT_find.reason: TodoMVC implements its spec correctly; flagging these would be a false positive.
The reference app supports the core TodoMVC CRUD and completion flows.
All, Active, and Completed filters are part of the reference app contract.
This vendored vanilla fixture uses localStorage and should preserve todos across reload.
